name: Kotone Fujita
description: __Height:__ 156 cm A greedy, expressive girl internally promoted from the middle school department who dreams of becoming a "money-making idol". She requested her parents to enroll her in Hatsuboshi Gakuen so that she could become an idol and earn enough income to support her large, poor family. However, her poor grades and high costs burdened her parents, causing her father to leave. She blamed herself for it. name: Kyousuke Yotsuya
description: [Miko's](https://anilist.co/character/139631) younger brother. Kyousuke is a young boy with short black hair. He is very protective of Miko, even going far enough to assume she has a boyfriend to be wary of.

name: Liam Banfield
nativeName: リアム・セラ・バンフィールド
description: Having lived a miserable life being virtuous, Liam decides to be evil in this next life. However, a combination of his long-term plans to strengthen and develop his fiefdom, comparison against the often corrupt and indolent nobility of the Empire, and comedic happenstance, he ends up looking like a benevolent and just ruler. Even his desire for gold looks odd as it has relatively low monetary value in the new world compared to metals like mithril and adamantium.

name: Makoto Kobayashi
description: The main character of the anime (novel). A soul who died and got another chance to re-enter the circle of reincarnation. He enters the body of a boy called Kobayashi Makoto who committed suicide. Now he has to find out what his own sin was and why Makoto died in a limited time or he is sent back. ~!It's later revealed that he's the soul of Makoto himself, so his sin was to commit suicide.!~

name: Manaria Sousse
description: Manaria Sousse is the first crown princess of the kingdom of Sousse. She is a distant relative of Claire. She is the world's first confirmed quad-caster who possesses the highest aptitude in every element. ~!Manaria was Claire's first love, although she was first mistaken for a boy, and helped Claire overcome the trauma of losing her mother. They grew close after this incident and would continue writing to each other for years to come.!~

name: Matsuri Dei
description: __Type:__ Goth Loli __Occupation:__ First-Year Middle School Student __Debut:__ Chapter 159 **Girlfriend No. 027** Matsuri is an outgoing and caring person. Matsuri holds a strong love for festivals and believes that they should be enjoyed to the fullest. She also tends to be loud-spoken and holds a wide stance regularly. Matsuri speaks using the Tokyo Shitamachi dialect, which is a low town working class dialect (albeit one old enough that it's used mostly in fiction as a joke).

name: Meito Anizawa

He and his staff consider Konata their most valued customer known as "Legendary Girl A" and go to great lengths to sell to her. Their attempts usually fail miserably. name: Midora
description: Midora is the leader of the Bishokukai and the main antagonist of Toriko. He is simply referred to as "Boss" by many of the organization's members. Midora was in the past trained by the legendary "Bishokuya God" Acacia as his third disciple, having been preceded by the IGO president Ichiryuu and the famed "Knocking Master" Jirou. He is currently directing the Bishokukai toward finding Acacia's main dish, GOD, in the Gourmet World.

name: Oriana Thomson
description: A blond English sorceress who works as a mercenary. Her sorcery name is Basis104, "From the foundation to carry." Her physical appearance is that of a beauty with a rather attractive figure, which makes most women around her jealous. She first appears during the Academy City Sports festival, for which she was hired by the Vatican for a special mission. She is later hired by Necessarius to help them investigate the source of the Euro Tunnel explosion.

name: Otoha Watase

At work, she is respected as a stern career woman, but at home, she is a soft person who jokes around and shows a kind expression. At home, she is naturally cheerful and carefree, such as taking a nap on the sofa. She lacks skills in housework, and while she did it when her daughters were young, she now leaves it all to Nagisa.
